T0387.title: Full-Service Packaging
T0387.definition: A full-service fraud package offered by underground rings, covering document forgery, data fabrication, and bribing bank insiders to secure loan approvals.
T0387.description: 在信贷欺诈中，“一条龙”意味着黑产中介包办了骗贷的所有环节。他们为不具备资质的客户伪造工作证明、银行流水，甚至买通金融机构内部人员，确保贷款获批。这种全包服务收费高昂，风险也极高，常导致金融机构形成大额坏账。
T0387.usageExample: Recruiting nationwide: pure white, blank slate, or real estate credit clients for a full-service package. Graduation total starting from 5 million.

references.title: [Underground Big Data] Desperados in Financial Fraud
